title: Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Kale Consultants South Asia Partners in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kale Consultants South Asia Partners:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants South Asia Partners!
